title: Kings And Tyrants.
content:
'Twixt kings and tyrants there's this difference known:
    Kings seek their subjects' good, tyrants their own.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Kings And Tyrants.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
